snapshotsPurpose: visibility-only admin data for operators; not production feed output

publicMapStatus.summary: Production map operational and gated; Event Sources work does not modify map runtime.
publicMapStatus.note: Admin snapshots are not consumed by the public map.

adminDashboardStatus.summary: Static admin skeleton exists; data panels not wired yet.

eventSourcesStatus.summary: Dev tooling covers inventory, normalizers, freshness, TVPP candidate feed, triage, and location readiness audit.

productionMapWiringStatus.summary: No admin snapshot or Event Sources dev output is wired into the live map.

warnings: Admin data snapshots are visibility-only and must not be treated as production feed JSON.
Snapshots do not create GPS coordinates, call geocoding APIs, or write geocode caches.
Triage and locationReadiness metadata are operator hints only — not approval or map visibility controls.

masterCompletionTracker.summary: Existing map/feeds are operational and gated. Remaining work is geocodes, QA, more sources, and controlled promotion.
Source inventory, normalizers, sample pipelines, freshness, query tuning, TVPP candidate feed, triage, and location readiness audit are built.
TVPP is current, normalized, sampled, triaged, and location-audited. No geocoding, production feed file, scoring, or map wiring.
Dev proof is strong. Production output, scheduled generation, cache/feed writes, and map integration are intentionally not done.
Requirement documented; static skeleton exists; admin data snapshots v0 available; data panels not wired.
No extractor, registry DB, reconciliation, seed workflow, UI, feeds, or WordPress integration.
Production map exists and Event Sources intelligence is stronger, but admin dashboard, XRI, WordPress, production event feed integration, and automation remain incomplete.
